texto: I should like to think that had I been around at the time I would have been a convinced anti-Nazi engaged in the underground resistance fight. However, I know really that I would have been as confused and felt as helpless as most of the people I am writing about
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Ian Kershaw: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “I should like to think that had I been around at the time I would have been a convinced anti-Nazi…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, politics, would pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
